content: Pet adoption platform components: listing management (pet details, photos, health status), search/filter (breed, age, location, species), application/review workflow, shelter/individual seller profiles, trust signals (verified profiles, review system tied to transactions). Marketplace build sequence: 1) Core data model + auth, 2) Supply-side (listings), 3) Discovery (search, categories), 4) Communication (messaging), 5) Payments, 6) Reviews, 7) Admin tooling. Multi-role: buyers/adopters, sellers/shelters, service providers, admin/moderators.
